stemHtml: After landing, a pilot is cleared by the tower controller to taxi to his parking stand. He properly reads back and receives acknowledgement. Afterwards, he is instructed “Monitor Ground on 118.7”. The pilot…

options.a: Stops right after having vacated the runway and calls Ground on 118.7 to let them know that he is monitoring their frequency.
options.b: Starts taxiing according to the clearance issued by the tower, switches to 118.7 and waits for Ground to make contact.
options.c: Stops right after having vacated the runway, switches to 118.7 and waits for Ground to contact him.
options.d: Starts taxiing according to the clearance issued by the tower and calls Ground on 118.7 to let them know that he is monitoring their frequency.
